creator: mjs@bur.st
text:
Hi,

I am happy for the patch to go in the way it is.

The reason for the filename change seems justified, and the content is on 
the mark.

Cheers,

Mitch

----- Original Message ----- 
From: "Jani Kaarela" <jani.kaarela@gmail.com>
To: "Sahil Tandon" <sahil@freebsd.org>
Cc: <bug-followup@freebsd.org>; <mjs@bur.st>
Sent: Sunday, April 18, 2010 8:04 PM
Subject: Re: ports/145578: Upgrade www/grails to version 1.2.2


On Sat, Apr 17, 2010 at 5:54 PM, Sahil Tandon <sahil@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Why does the file name change from set-grails_home.sed to
> edit-startGrails.sed? Is this change really necessary? And please
> confirm the contents of the file are correct.

Changed the file name because in addition to setting Grails home, it
also fixes a "bashism" in the script. Just thought "set-grails_home"
would be a bit misleading since it does other stuff, too. Doesn't
really matter.

-j
